2026-03-27T04:21:30.3627792Z Review submitted for PR #37655 (`@azure/arm-datafactory` v20.0.0). **3 issues found:**
2026-03-27T04:21:30.3628354Z 
2026-03-27T04:21:30.3629257Z 1. **Tool** — `autoPublish: false` (line 9, `package.json`) — was `true`; stable releases must set this to `true` for NPM auto-publish.
2026-03-27T04:21:30.3629980Z 
2026-03-27T04:21:30.3631185Z 2. **Design** — `AzureClouds` enum (line 744, `arm-datafactory-node.api.md`) — missing the `Known*` prefix and uses `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` members instead of `PascalCase`, inconsistent with all other enums in the package.
2026-03-27T04:21:30.3631910Z 
2026-03-27T04:21:30.3655121Z 3. **Design** — `AzureSupportedClouds = \`${AzureClouds}\`` (line 1725) — closed template literal restricts forward compatibility; should be `string`.

2026-03-27T04:21:43.9034171Z [INGESTION] First 500 chars of output: {"body":"🔴 **Design Issue** — `AzureSupportedClouds` uses a closed template-literal union instead of `string`\n\n```ts\nexport type AzureSupportedClouds = `${AzureClouds}`;\n```\n\nThis is a closed union type that restricts callers to exactly the values in the `AzureClouds` enum. When Azure adds a new cloud environment in the service, existing client code would fail to compile. The standard Azure SDK pattern for extensible string enums is:\n\n```ts\nexport type AzureSupportedClouds = string;\n`

Use with pagination parameters to control the number of results returned.\n 5. get_review_comments - Get review threads on a pull request. Each thread contains logically grouped review comments made on the same code location during pull request reviews. Returns threads with metadata (isResolved, isOutdated, isCollapsed) and their associated comments. Use cursor-based pagination (perPage, after) to control results.\n 6. get_reviews - Get the reviews on a pull request. 2026-03-27T04:21:46.2441981Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-03-27T04:21:46.2442133Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-03-27T04:21:46.2442580Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-03-27T04:21:46.2442910Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-03-27T04:21:46.2443041Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-03-27T04:21:46.2443190Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-03-27T04:21:46.2443277Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-03-27T04:21:46.2443462Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-03-27T04:21:46.2443543Z [36;1mfi[0m
